description: Balanced AI-enabled resilience across monitoring forecasting scenarios decisions governance equity human oversight local knowledge security risk and burden.
Prioritizes weak signal detection anomaly detection forecasting and timely warnings.
Prioritizes stress testing scenario modeling plausible futures and trade-off exploration.
Prioritizes decision support linked to human review accountable judgment and action.
Prioritizes governance audit purpose limitation monitoring accountability and corrective action.
Prioritizes equity safeguards vulnerability justice representation appeal and data rights.
Prioritizes human judgment local validation appeal manual fallback and override authority.
Prioritizes local knowledge community participation Indigenous knowledge frontline expertise and contextual interpretation.
Prioritizes security adversarial robustness cyber defense data poisoning resistance and misuse prevention.
Penalizes implementation burden when governance staffing data infrastructure trust or capacity is constrained.
